nasb.text: He had two wives: the name of one was Hannah and the name of the other Peninnah; and Peninnah had children, but Hannah had no children.

esv.text: He had two wives. The name of the one was Hannah, and the name of the other, Peninnah. And Peninnah had children, but Hannah had no children.

cnv.text: 他有兩個妻子，一個名叫哈拿，另一個名叫毘尼拿。毘尼拿有孩子，哈拿卻沒有孩子。

ccb.text: 他有两个妻子，一个叫哈娜，一个叫毗尼娜。毗尼娜有儿有女，哈娜却无儿无女。
